notes: Dining/bar venue INSIDE Yogi Bear's Jellystone Park Golden Valley campground (Sun Outdoors resort), Bostic. Web is resort-controlled (campgoldenvalley.com) = NOT an independent buyable client (P12-like disqualifier). Do not confuse with the unrelated Blue Ridge Tavern at Asheville airport/Fletcher.

Cafe inside Yogi Bear's Jellystone Park Golden Valley campground (Sun Outdoors). Uses a menufy ordering page (aggregator, not a site); web resort-controlled = resort outlet, not independent. 13 reviews on Restaurantji, no rating captured.

Genuine Cherryville business, 101 W Church St, family-owned SINCE 1996 (longevity signal). Real site but a basic free-tier Wix subdomain (weak). Reviews mixed platform: 207 on Restaurantji, 4.1 on Tripadvisor (#6/21 Cherryville).

Real Cherryville business, 1409 E Main St. FB-only (two FB pages), plus Yelp/Tripadvisor. Hershey's hand-dipped, 80+ flavors; some listings tag it a food truck. ~35 reviews (Tripadvisor, 100% recommend). No website.

KM ESTABLISHMENT SIGNAL: coffee-by-day / full-bar + live-sports-by-night concept at 212 S Railroad Ave, downtown Kings Mountain. Investment-grade fit-out, recent rebrand under 'Royal T'. FB (kmroyaltcafe) + IG only, no website. Fits the casino-territory growth thesis.

Real USDA butcher/meat processor, 394 US-221A Forest City (145 Rollins Rd processing). SCALE signal: works with 45+ independent farmers, USDA slaughter + custom-cut facility. FB-only web (the .com-place.com hit is a scraper directory, not a site).

LOCATION CORRECTION: actually in Rutherfordton NC (Rutherford County), not Forest City. Real custom-domain site (nwsbakingco.com, with About + Menu pages) = artisan scratch bakery. Already has a real website = low gap. Full page render was 403-blocked; grade inferred from structure.

TIER-1 SHELBY, 116 E Warren St uptown. Cafe + adjacent 'Confections' bakery. Tripadvisor 4.9 (#13/85 Shelby). FB + Clover online-ordering + Uber Eats only, NO owned website. Strong uptown/home-turf fit.

Reported PERMANENTLY CLOSED (MenuPix), 1205 Shelby Hwy Cherryville. DROP. The operating Cherryville Chinese spot is Hong Kong Restaurant (104 N Cherry St). Closure not independently Google-confirmed, so gbpClosed left null.

No Cherryville location found. Hoshi Express is a local MULTI-LOCATION mini-chain (Lincolnton 1215 E Main + Shelby 121 N Main), Japanese fast-food since 2016. 'Cherryville' is likely a mislabel. res-menu.net listing is an aggregator, not a site.

No House of Pizza confirmed in Cherryville. The name belongs to Charlotte (3640 Central Ave, houseofpizza.com) and a Lincolnton location. Cherryville results only surface Pizza Inn (a franchise). Likely a mislabel/non-existent Cherryville entity.

LOCATION: Lincolnton (357 N Generals Blvd), not Cherryville (family roots trace to Cherryville/Lincolnton). Opened Mar 2013, co-owned by Sackett & wife Christy; 150+ bottled beers/18 drafts. FB/IG active, but one directory (BringFido) flags '(Closed)' — verify current status before use.

LOCATION: Lincolnton (475 N Generals Blvd), NOT Cherryville. Established 12+ yrs, grew 5->30 staff, 1,109 reviews (Birdeye) = high capacity. CAUTION: local news reports the owner died unexpectedly (succession/continuity risk). FB + allmenus only, no site.

LOCATION: Lincolnton (Italianno's Cucina Italiana, 1611 N Aspen St), not Cherryville. Italian, pet-friendly patio. FB-only (italiannos.us). Note italiannosrestaurant.com is a DIFFERENT business ('Sandano's Italian Sub Shop'). Genuine business, mislabeled town.

LOCATION: Lincolnton (116 NE Ct Sq downtown), not Cherryville. In-house roaster + bakery, community 'third place'; history to 1995, current owners Miriah Truluck-Rhodes & Jacob Rhodes (bought 2010). Despite the coffee-shop expectation, it is FB/IG only — NO real website (fausto.co.uk is an unrelated UK company). Longevity + named owners = strong lead.
LOCATION: Lincolnton (101 Court Sq), not Cherryville. Reported PERMANENTLY CLOSED (MenuPix). DROP. Closure not Google-confirmed, so gbpClosed left null.

LOCATION: Lincolnton (113 W Ct Sq), not Cherryville; 2nd location in Mountain View. Real site (courtstreetgrille.com) but DATED WordPress, no online ordering, agency footer 'Website by Philbeck Web Design'. Owners Osama & Carrie Yousef; open since 2003; Tripadvisor 4.4 (#1/59 Lincolnton). Classic Route-A weak-old-site target.

KM: appears on Yelp's Kings Mountain pizza list (a review references ordering from it) but minimal online footprint — no address/site/review count surfaced. Low-confidence existence; verify locally. KM casino-territory.

No 'Last Call Social Club' confirmed in Kings Mountain NC. A 'Last Call Social Club' operates in CLOVER, SC (103 Bethel St, karaoke bar, York County) — likely the mislabeled entity and OUT OF TERRITORY (SC). Verify before use.

No Kings Mountain 'Nagoya' confirmed — surfaces only in aggregated area listings; other Nagoyas are Greensboro NC / Piedmont & Boiling Springs SC. KM's actual Japanese spot is Yamato Express (1000 W Gold St, 22 reviews). Likely a mislabel — verify.
